elements.label: Description
elements.value: A common small fruit. Merges into Grape.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/strawberry.schema.json, set ct_straw_radius to {{ct_straw_radius}}]
Set Strawberry radius to {{ct_straw_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/strawberry.schema.json, set ct_straw_score to {{ct_straw_score}}]
Set Strawberry merge score to {{ct_straw_score}} points.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/strawberry.schema.json, set ct_straw_weight to {{ct_straw_weight}}]
Set Strawberry spawn weight to {{ct_straw_weight}}.
